name: k1_stackable_petg_crate_half_height
description: Near-full-plate, half-height stackable crate for the Creality K1, tuned for black PETG, low filament use, denser diamond visibility cutouts, hand holds, and a front label area.

material.notes: Dry PETG and avoid an outside brim unless the slicer keeps adhesion inside the 220 mm bed.

stacking.type: tapered bottom locator into reinforced top rim

features.name: left_right_hand_holds
features.description: Lower side slots with reinforced pads sized for lifting a half-height crate.

features.name: front_label_plaque
features.description: Raised flat front plaque for adhesive labels.

features.name: internal_ribs
features.description: Taper-following vertical ribs and low floor ribs add stiffness without thick solid walls.

features.name: dense_visibility_hole_lattice
features.description: Five rows of smaller repeating diamond holes on all four sides reduce material and make contents visible while avoiding the label plaque, hand-hold pads, top rim, and base.

manufacturing.suggested_bed_adhesion: Avoid an outside brim unless the slicer keeps it inside the 220 mm bed.

requirements: Fit inside the Creality K1 build envelope with margin.
Use the full practical plate footprint while reducing height to a crate-like half-height form.
Use a stackable interface compatible with the earlier tall box design.
Keep the design single-material and support-free.
Use more diamond cutouts than the tall box variant to reduce filament and improve visibility.
Provide hand holds and a visible label location.
notes: This variant intentionally keeps the same top footprint and stacking dimensions as the tall box.
The diamond grid is denser, but keep-outs preserve the grip pads, label plaque, base, and top rim.
Slice preview should still be checked before a long PETG print because the footprint is close to the K1 limits.
